comment: 29yo female, recently confirmed MSH2 germline pathogenic variant (cascade testing after mother's CRC diagnosis revealed Lynch syndrome). No personal cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan (after Agent I Wave 2 confirmed-carrier pathway lands): standard = NCCN Genetic/Familial High-Risk Colorectal carrier surveillance — colonoscopy q1-2y from 25 (or 10y before youngest family CRC), endometrial sampling + TVUS q1-2y from 30-35, urinalysis annual, upper endoscopy q3-5y from 40; alternative = intensified track with risk-reducing hysterectomy/BSO discussion post-childbearing + aspirin per CAPP2 trial.
